lyrics.text: Waking up I see that everything is ok
lyrics.translation: 睁开双眼 我发现 一切如期上演

lyrics.text: The first time in my life and now it's so great
lyrics.translation: 我的生活从未如此美好呈现

lyrics.text: Slowing down I look around and I am so amazed
lyrics.translation: 放慢脚步环顾四面 我感到惊艳

lyrics.text: I think about the little things that make life great
lyrics.translation: 我开始看见那些让生活美好的细节

lyrics.text: I wouldn't change a thing about it
This is the best feeling
This innocence is brilliant
I hope that it will stay
This moment is perfect
please don't go away
I need you now
And I'll hold on to it
don't you let it pass you by
I found a place so safe not a single tear
lyrics.translation: 我发现这片没有一滴眼泪的安全空间

lyrics.text: The first time in my life and now it's so clear
lyrics.translation: 我的生活从未如此清晰呈现

lyrics.text: Feel calm I belong I'm so happy here
lyrics.translation: 不再狂躁开始留恋 这是我的乐园

lyrics.text: It's so strong and now I let myself be sincere
lyrics.translation: 强烈的震撼现在我让自己变得诚虔

lyrics.text: I wouldn't change a thing about it
This is the best feeling
This innocence is brilliant
I hope that it will stay
This moment is perfect
please don't go away
I need you now
And I'll hold on to it
don't you let it pass you by
It's the state of bliss you think you're dreaming
lyrics.translation: 幸福的状态让你以为这是梦幻

lyrics.text: It's the happiness inside that you're feeling
lyrics.translation: 而你真切感到快乐的浸染

lyrics.text: It's so beautiful,it makes you wanna cry
lyrics.translation: 如此美丽令你不禁泪眼潸然

lyrics.text: It's the state of bliss you think you're dreaming
lyrics.translation: 幸福的状态让你以为这是梦幻

lyrics.text: It's the happiness inside that you're feeling
lyrics.translation: 而你真切感到快乐的浸染

lyrics.text: It's so beautiful,it makes you wanna cry
lyrics.translation: 如此美丽令你不禁泪眼潸然

lyrics.text: It's so beautiful,it makes you wanna cry
lyrics.translation: 如此美丽令你不禁泪眼潸然

lyrics.text: This innocence is brilliant
it makes you want to cry
This innocence is brilliant
please don't go away
Cause I need you now
lyrics.translation: 因为现在是我需要你的时候

lyrics.text: And I'll hold on to it
don't you let it pass you by
This innocence is brilliant
I hope that it will stay
This moment is perfect
please don't go away
I need you now
And I'll hold on to it
don't you let it pass you by
